parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $json.message || 'Unauthorized: Invalid or missing API key' }) }}

parameters.query: SELECT workflow_id, task_type, tenant_id, scope_pattern, constraints_jsonb, enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM policy_workflows WHERE workflow_id='{{ $json.workflow_id.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' AND task_type='{{ $json.task_type.replace(/'/g, "''") }}' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1;
